name: Suspension of Interest via Deficiency Waiver

eligibility.description: Taxpayers facing an audit deficiency who are willing to waive the right to petition the Tax Court to stop the accrual of interest during IRS processing delays.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Suspends the imposition of interest on a deficiency if the taxpayer files a waiver of restrictions on assessment (Form 870) and the IRS fails to issue a notice and demand for payment within 30 days.
